betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Fluid Infuser: Add Fluids to Items§f

§aThe Fluid Infuser soaks items in fluid to produce new chemical products.§f
The §bFluid Infuser§f (`nuclearcraft:infuser`) is a §b1-item + 1-fluid + 1-item-output§f NC processor. It performs §b§f§cfluid infusion recipes§f§f — items are soaked in fluids to produce new items, often upgrading lower-tier materials to higher-tier ones (e.g. Manganese Dust + Oxygen → Manganese Oxide Dust).

§6Crafting Recipe (graph: minecraft.crafting)§f:
Per the JEI graph, the Fluid Infuser recipe requires:
- §bAdvanced Plating§f (`nuclearcraft:part:1`)
- §bGold Ingot§f (`minecraft:gold_ingot`)
- §bMachine Chassis§f (`nuclearcraft:part:10`)
- §bServomechanism§f (`nuclearcraft:part:7`)

§6Function (InfuserRecipes.java)§f:
Per the `InfuserRecipes` class:
- §bSlots: 1 item input + 1 fluid input + 1 item output§f
- §bPower: FE only§f
- §bUpgrades: Speed / Energy§f

§6Example Recipes§f:
- §bManganese Dust§f (`nuclearcraft:dust:11`) + §bOxygen / Water§f → §bManganese Oxide Dust§f (`nuclearcraft:dust:14`)
- §bManganese Oxide Dust§f (`nuclearcraft:dust:14`) + §bOxygen§f → §bManganese Dioxide Dust§f (`nuclearcraft:dust:15`)
- §bBoron-11 Dust§f + §bWater§f → §bBoric Acid§f fluid
- §bVarious dusts + water/air/fluid§f → upgraded dusts (oxidation, hydration, dissolution)
- §bQMD Wire Chamber Detector§f recipe: §bEmpty Wire Chamber§f → §bWire Chamber Detector§f via NC Infuser

§6Why It's Useful§f:
- §bOxidation chain§f: the §b§f§cManganese → Manganese Oxide → Manganese Dioxide§f§f chain is the §b§f§cbackbone of Lithium-Ion Battery production§f§f.
- §bAcid production§f: the Fluid Infuser is used to make §bBoric Acid§f and other §b§f§ccatalysts§f§f for downstream recipes.
- §bDetector construction§f: QMD's §bWire Chamber Detector§f is produced by infusing an §bEmpty Wire Chamber§f in this machine.
- §bGeneral-purpose chemistry§f: any recipe that needs to add a fluid component to a solid item is processed here.

§6Component Supply Chain§f:
- §bAdvanced Plating§f → from §bTough Alloy Ingot§f + §bRedstone§f in vanilla crafting
- §bGold Ingot§f → from §bGold Ore§f processing
- §bMachine Chassis§f → from §bNC Manufactory§f
- §bServomechanism§f → from §bIron + Redstone + Steel Frame§f

§eTip§f: §b§f§cBuild TWO Fluid Infusers early§f§f — one dedicated to the §bManganese Oxide / Dioxide chain§f§f (for battery production) and one for general chemistry (Boric Acid, Wire Chamber Detector, etc.). Each can be fully upgraded for parallel processing.
